title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind presents updates to Gemini including Gemini 3 with upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The session covers new workflows for building agentic applications and research advancements in agent design via Vertex AI.
writeup: This video details Google DeepMind's latest Gemini upgrades: stronger model reasoning, expanded context windows, and improved multimodal tool use. The changes matter because they support agentic applications in Vertex AI, tying model improvements to deployable workflows. Concrete takeaways include the connection between expanded context and tool use, and research advances in agent design that underpin these agentic capabilities.
